items.caption:
A composite of two separate elements. the top part shows a dog lying on the ground next to a wheelchair, which appears to be broken. the dog is wearing a purple garment and has a leash attached to it. the wheelchair is purple and has a broken wheel. there is a red brick surface beneath them, and the background is a red wall with a white patch. the text overlay reads "paralyzed dog abandoned on street with broken wheelchair and a note."

the bottom part of the image is a still from a movie or tv show featuring a character with a serious expression. the character has a bald head and is wearing a dark outfit with a cape. the text overlay reads, "now i know what i must do. i will shred this universe down to its last atom."

the style of the image suggests it is meant to evoke an emotional response, likely to raise awareness about the abandonment of a disabled dog and to contrast it with a dramatic, heroic statement.
